prompt: Please clarify the definition of 'Gateway' in the Terminology section. The current definition only mentions the primary use case, but it also applies to secondary/async scenarios. Can you update it to cover both paths?

assertions.name: Surgical edit, no restructuring
assertions.description: Changes only the target definition, doesn't alter other sections or propose new structure

assertions.name: Covers both paths
assertions.description: Updated definition addresses both primary (synchronous) and secondary (asynchronous) scenarios

assertions.name: Preserves original tone
assertions.description: Maintains concise, list-style format of the Terminology section

assertions.name: Clarifies without excessive length
assertions.description: Adds necessary context without becoming verbose
